title: pseuderanthemum modestum
intro: Pseuderanthemum modestum, also known as false fern or modest false fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Pseuderanthemum modestum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat various skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and topical applications to harness its medicinal properties.
